core_concept: The Tactile Factory - High density production tracking meets the warmth of physical garment manufacturing. Mobile-first utility.

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for expanded sheet forms. Dense touch-friendly spacing (p-2, p-3) for board cards.
layout.board_strategy: Mobile-first horizontal scroll (snap-x snap-mandatory). Each column takes 85vw on mobile so the next column peeks. Standard flex-row with overflow-x-auto on desktop.
layout.card_expansion: Shadcn Sheet component (Slide-over from right on desktop, bottom drawer or full screen on mobile). Do not expand in-place to avoid breaking Kanban context.
layout.surface_strategy: Cards use flat solid background (bg-white) with 1px border (border-border) and soft shadow-sm. Rounded-md. Hover: -translate-y-[2px] shadow-md.

components.drag_and_drop: Use dnd-kit for touch-optimized drag and drop.
components.forms: Customize Shadcn UI Inputs. Remove generic focus rings. Use robust 2px focus border in Primary Orange.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs for Info, Budget, Size Grid, Checklist, Image, Layout. Tab triggers should use pill-shaped design, orange bg for active.
components.size_grid_tab: Dense matrix layout using CSS Grid. Apply Grid Borders (visible skeleton) for rows/columns of sizes (Adult PP-XXXG, Kids T1-T16).
components.budget_tab: Minimalist table, numeric values aligned right. Bold total rows.
components.checklist_tab: Custom checkboxes. Checked state should cross out text.
components.cards: Keep cards compact: Order ID, Client Name, Deadline, Item Count, and a colored left-border indicating status/column.

icons.style: Duotone weight for high-end tactile feel.

login_background.description: Screen printing machine with yellow ink design. Use for a split-screen login page background (50% image / 50% form).

placeholder_tshirt.description: White blank t-shirt mockup. Use as placeholder image inside the 'Image upload' or 'Layout' tab.

animations.card_drag: Scale down slightly (scale-95), rotate 2deg, apply drop-shadow-xl during active drag.
animations.interactions: Smooth transitions on hover for buttons (bg-color, transform).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on Orange button passes APCA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='move-to-corte-btn').
accessibility.mobile_touch: Ensure all tap targets (buttons, checklist items, cards) are at least 44x44px.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Phosphor icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Use dnd-kit for the Kanban board drag-and-drop functionality.
Construct the 12 specific columns (Orçamento, Aguardando, Aprovado, Malha, Corte, Silk, Costura, Conferência, Expedição, Finalizado, Erros, Arquivado) correctly.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts and apply them in tailwind.config.
Build the detailed order form inside a Slide-over (Shadcn Sheet), so users don't lose the board context when viewing an order.
Implement the 6 tabs explicitly: Info, Budget, Size Grid, Checklist, Image, Layout notes.
Design the Size Grid as a tight matrix/table of inputs.
Ensure the layout is highly usable on mobile. The board MUST be horizontally scrollable without breaking.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive and structural components.
Include simple PDF generation hook (can be mocked with browser window.print or jsPDF if possible).
Include mockup state variables for Backup/Restore triggers.
